sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ دَوَاءٍ لِلسُّعَالِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je otišao u apoteku da kupi lijek protiv kašlja.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to the pharmacy to buy cough medicine.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنْهُ الصَّيْدَلِيُّ قِرَاءَةَ التَّعْلِيمَاتِ الْمَوْجُودَةِ عَلَى الْعُلْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut ga je zamolio da pročita uputstva na kutiji.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist asked him to read the instructions on the box.

sentences.arabic: شَرِبَ أَحْمَدُ الدَّوَاءَ بَعْدَ تَنَاوُلِ الطَّعَامِ كَمَا قَالَ الطَّبِيبُ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je popio lijek nakon jela, kao što je doktor rekao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed took the medicine after eating, as the doctor said.
